title: solanum indicum subsp. olivaceum
intro: Solanum indicum subsp. olivaceum, also known as wild eggplant, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family and is native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Solanum indicum subsp. olivaceum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Solanum indicum subsp. olivaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
